name: Orange Buttermilk Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring the crushed pineapple to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and add the orange gelatin, stirring until dissolved.
3. Add the buttermilk and mix well.
4. Allow mixture to cool to room temperature.
5. Fold in the whipped topping.
6. Pour into an 11 inch x 7 inch dish and refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
7. Cut into squares before serving.
